mapper.sql: select id, instance_id, expire_time, payload_json, signature, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_license
mapper.update: update sys_license set expire_time = #{expireTime}, payload_json = #{payloadJson}, signature = #{signature}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
